sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str1 VARCHAR, str2 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'hello', 'hallo');
UPDATE test_strings SET str1 = 'duck', str2 = 'duckdb' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT jaro_similarity(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, str1, str2, jaro_similarity(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
